def positive_namedtuple_used_where_dataclass_better_fits():
    rule_id = "namedtuple_used_where_dataclass_better_fits"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "collections.namedtuple used for a record that needs default values, mutation, or methods."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
